column1: # Phase 10 — `/Worksheet Learn` + Alt-F5. Define a learn range,
# arm recording, type a few keystrokes, disarm, and confirm the
# recorded macro source materializes in the learn range cells.
# /WLR — POINT for the learn range (B1..B3 — three rows of capacity).
ASSERT_PANEL_L3 Enter range to record into
# Pointer back to A1 for the recording.
# Alt-F5: arm recording. LEARN indicator lights.
# Capture some keystrokes: type 'hi', Enter, Down arrow.
# Alt-F5 again: disarm. LEARN indicator goes away. The buffered
# source flushes into B1 (single cell — well under the 240 cap).
# Verify B1 captured the recording. Apostrophe prefix because the
# label was created via the recorder, not typed by the user.
